title: Incoming e-Document Lookup
description: Validate an incoming e-Invoice or e-Archive UUID through eLogo, retrieve PDF/UBL documents and inspect parsed line details.

form.title: UUID e-Invoice / e-Archive Lookup
form.description: Enter the UUID directly or paste UBL/XML content. Auto mode tries e-Invoice first, then e-Archive.

companies.title: eLogo Company Definitions
companies.description: Connection records come from SQL; passwords are stored protected.

connections.title: eLogo Connections
connections.description: Manage company connections used for incoming invoice and e-Archive lookups from SQL.

form.passwordKeep: Leave empty to keep the existing password

guidance.title: Operational Note
guidance.description: In auto mode the API tries the same UUID against e-Invoice first and then e-Archive. eLogo may return some PDFs inside a ZIP package; the API extracts the PDF before returning it.
guidance.secretNote: For production use, enter the company web service password from the eLogo connection management screen.

result.title: Last Downloaded Document
result.description: PDF details from the last successful lookup.

detail.title: Invoice Header
detail.description: The UBL/XML document was loaded through {{method}} and parsed.

lines.title: Invoice Lines
lines.description: Goods/service rows from UBL are parsed with stock code, quantity, price and VAT data.

taxes.title: Tax Summary
taxes.description: VAT taxable amount, rate and amount breakdown.

messages.uuidRequired: Enter a valid UUID or paste XML containing a UUID.
messages.detailFailed: Invoice detail could not be loaded.
